en_body:
The sky lets down its cloud-hair
Rain, the hair of clouds
combs the leaf-hair of branches
Leaf-hair of branches combs
Branch-hair of trees
Trees stretch their root-hair into earth
Grass, the hair of earth, reaches
for rain, the hair of clouds

I sit beside the window
Combing my hair, awaiting
Your Hand, the hair of Love
to comb my beloved hair
...Oh Autumn,
beside the window
Combed hair awaits Love's hair!

Combed Hair Awaiting Love's Hair
The sky lets down its cloud-hair
Rain, the hair of clouds
combs the leaf-hair of branches
Leaf-hair of branches combs
Branch-hair of trees
Trees stretch their root-hair into earth
Grass, the hair of earth, reaches
for rain, the hair of clouds

I sit beside the window
Combing my hair, awaiting
Your Hand, the hair of Love
to comb my beloved hair
...Oh Autumn,
beside the window
Combed hair awaits Love's hair!
note: The poem turns tóc, “hair,” into a chain binding sky, rain, leaves, roots, earth, and the Beloved's hand.
